name: Bria AI
description: Controllable visual generative AI for enterprises, trained exclusively on licensed data (Getty, Depositphotos, Envato, Freepik).

when_to_use: Generating commercially licensed AI images for marketing use

Creating brand-safe visual variations without stock photo rights

pros: Licensed-only training data reduces IP risk
cons: Output style narrower than Midjourney or SDXL
review.verdict: The safe pick for brands that need image gen without copyright exposure.
